author: lOrm
content:
## OC-current behavioral spec ‚Äî plugins + skills

### B1 ‚Äî `PluginManager::build()` discovery search paths (`src/plugins/manager.rs:126-144`)
**Contract**: Constructs search-paths list (in order, may include non-existent dirs):
1. `~/.openclaudia/plugins` (user scope, if `dirs::home_dir()` resolves).
2. `~/.claude/plugins` (Claude Code compat shim, same condition).
3. `.openclaudia/plugins` (project scope, CWD-relative ‚Äî note: NOT walked to project root).

Plus `installed: InstalledPlugins::load(&project_root_cwd())` ‚Äî V2 `installed_plugins.json` registry.
`try_new()` returns `Err(PluginError::InstallError(...))` when `dirs::home_dir()` is `None` (production paths MUST use this). `new()` builds silently with empty user-scope set.

### B2 ‚Äî `PluginManager::discover()` filesystem-then-installed pass (`manager.rs:157-240`)
**Contract**: Returns `Vec<PluginError>` collecting non-fatal failures; does not short-circuit.
Phase 1: walk each search path (skipped silently with `debug!` if non-existent; `warn!` and continue on `read_dir` failure). For each immediate subdirectory: `Plugin::load(path)`. Outcomes:
- `Ok(plugin)` ‚Üí inserted into `self.plugins` (HashMap keyed by plugin name); emits `info!` with `name`, `version`, `path`, `commands`, `hooks`, `mcp` counts.
- `Err(ManifestNotFound)` ‚Üí silently skipped at `debug!` (most subdirs lack a manifest).
- Other `Err(_)` ‚Üí pushed to error list, logged `warn!`.

Phase 2: walk `installed.plugins` (HashMap of `plugin_id ‚Üí [InstalledPluginEntry]`). For each entry: skip if `install_path` missing (`debug!`); skip if a plugin with that name was already loaded from search paths (Phase 1 wins). Else `Plugin::load(install_path)`; on success, override `plugin.id` from registry key and parse `marketplace` from `name@marketplace` form, store under name; emits `info!` with `id`, `name`, `scope`.

### B3 ‚Äî `check_marketplace_allowed` two-phase policy (`src/plugins/policy.rs:103-121`)
**Contract**: `(source: &MarketplaceSource, policy: &PluginPolicy) -> Result<(), PolicyRejection>`.
1. Iterate `policy.blocked_marketplaces`; on any `sources_match` hit, return `Err(Blocked)` immediately. Blocklist takes precedence even if the source is also in the allowlist.
2. If `policy.strict_known_marketplaces.is_some()`: scan list, if no match return `Err(NotInAllowlist)`. `None` ‚Üí no allowlist enforcement (any non-blocked source allowed). `Some(empty)` ‚Üí everything rejected with `NotInAllowlist`.
3. `Ok(())`.

`sources_match` rules by variant: `GitHub` repo case-insensitive; `git_ref`/`path` use `wild_match_opt` (rule-side `None` is a wildcard, candidate-side `None` cannot satisfy a concrete rule). `Git` URLs canonicalized via `canonical_git` (strip trailing `.git`, trailing `/`, lowercase host, drop default ports). `Url`/`File`/`Directory` verbatim string compare. Mixed variants never match.

`PluginManager::policy_rejection_to_error` (manager.rs:305-323) maps `Blocked ‚Üí "source is on the block list"`, `NotInAllowlist ‚Üí "source is not on the allowed list (strict_known_marketplaces)"`, both wrapped in `PluginError::PolicyRejected { reason, scope }` where scope ‚àà `{"managed","user"}`.

### B4 ‚Äî Skill file parsing (`src/skills.rs:181-211`, `parse_skill_file`)
**Contract**: `&Path -> Result<SkillDefinition, SkillParseError>`.
Reads bytes; strips leading `U+FEFF` BOM; normalizes CRLF/CR ‚Üí LF (only when `\r` is detected). Requires content to start with `---`; locates closing `---` via `rest.find("---")?`. Frontmatter slice trimmed and `serde_yaml::from_str` ‚Üí `SkillDefinition{name,description,allowed_tools:Option<Vec<String>>,...}`. Body trimmed; `skill.prompt = body`; `skill.path = path`.
**Error variants**: `ReadFailed(io::Error)` from `read_to_string` (file missing, permission denied); `FrontmatterMissing` if leading or trailing `---` absent; `YamlFailed(serde_yaml::Error)` if YAML is malformed. **No panic on any input.**
Public scan path (`parse_skill_file_logged`) converts errors to `Option`: `FrontmatterMissing` logged at `trace!` (expected for every plain `.md`); other errors at `warn!` with `skill_path` and `error` fields.

### B5 ‚Äî Skill directory walking (`src/skills.rs:122-302`)
**Contract**: `skill_dirs()` resolves candidates in priority order:
1. Project: walks `cwd().ancestors()` for the nearest `.openclaudia/config.yaml`; if found, push `<root>/.openclaudia/skills` (absolute) with `info!`. If no ancestor has the config file, the project-skills dir is omitted entirely with `debug!` (crosslink #823 ‚Äî refuses to silently scan a CWD-relative path).
2. User: `~/.openclaudia/skills` if `dirs::home_dir()` resolves.

`walk_skill_entries(dir)` is the single shared walker (also called by `plugins::Plugin::resolve_skills`, crosslink #832). Per immediate `read_dir` entry: if a directory containing `SKILL.md` ‚Üí `SkillEntry::DirWithSkillMd{dir,file}`; if a top-level file with extension `md` ‚Üí `SkillEntry::BareMdFile(path)`. Other entries dropped silently. Unreadable dir ‚Üí empty Vec.
`scan_one_dir` calls `parse_skill_file_logged`; if `skill.name.is_empty()`, falls back to dir name (for `DirWithSkillMd`) or file stem (for `BareMdFile`).

### B6 ‚Äî Skills cache invalidation (`src/skills.rs:336-403`)
**Contract**: `load_skills()` consults a process-wide `LazyLock<RwLock<Option<SkillsCache>>>`. Fast path: read lock, compare `current_mtimes(&dirs)` (Vec of `(PathBuf, Option<SystemTime>)` per dir) to cache; on equality clone and return. Slow path: write lock, double-check, then `load_skills_uncached` and store. Cache key changes when a dir appears, disappears, or its mtime moves ‚Äî but NOT when a `SKILL.md` is edited in place without bumping the parent dir's mtime; users can call `invalidate_cache()`.
Name-dedup: after walking project then user dirs, `skills.retain(|s| seen.insert(s.name.clone()))` ‚Äî **first occurrence wins**, so project skills shadow user skills with the same name.
`get_skill(name)` ‚Üí `load_skills().into_iter().find(|s| s.name == name)`.

### B7 ‚Äî `SkillDefinition` schema (`src/skills.rs:71-83`)
**Contract**: Only four fields are parsed from YAML frontmatter: `name`, `description`, `allowed_tools: Option<Vec<String>>` (serde `default`), and indirectly `path`/`prompt` (both `#[serde(skip)]`, populated after parse). Unknown frontmatter keys (e.g. `when_to_use`, `argument-hint`, `model`, `paths`, `version`) are silently ignored by serde ‚Äî no error, no warning.

### B8 ‚Äî Plugin source variants supported
**Plugins**: Direct directory scan; manifest formats accepted by `Plugin::load`: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `plugin.json`, or legacy `manifest.json`. Marketplaces are stored under `~/.openclaudia/marketplaces/`. `install_from_marketplace_with_policy` and `install_from_git_with_policy` apply the policy gate before any FS or network IO. No signature verification active (PolicyAction::RequireSignature is defined but not enforced by default).
**Skills**: Directory layout (`<name>/SKILL.md`) AND bare top-level `.md` files both supported; CC supports only the directory layout in its `/skills/` dir.
